compiled_state.title: Migrate inline ERR log traps in pre-edit-write-functions.sh to canonical log path
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Three functions in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-edit-write-functions.sh still define `local HOOK_ERROR_LOG="$HOME/.claude/hook-error-log.jsonl"` (legacy path). Update all 3 instances to the canonical path `$HOME/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl`.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-edit-write-functions.sh |

## Implementation
Search for `local HOOK_ERROR_LOG.*hook-error-log.jsonl` in pre-edit-write-functions.sh and change each instance to use `$HOME/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl`.

Also add corresponding assertions to tests/hooks/test-hook-inline-trap-consolidation.sh verifying these functions use the canonical path.
